channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MOSCHIP] Moschip to acquire 73% stake in Vayavya Labs for ₹245.49 Cr
item.description:
Moschip Technologies Ltd has announced the acquisition of a 73% controlling stake in Vayavya Labs Private Limited for a total consideration of ₹245.49 crores. The payment structure includes ₹148.52 crores (60.50%) in cash from internal accruals and ₹96.97 crores (39.50%) through the issuance of swap shares. The remaining 27% shareholding will be acquired after March 31, 2028, with valuation linked to Vayavya Labs' performance. This acquisition aims to scale Moschip's software-led Product Engineering Solutions business, increasing its headcount to over 2,000 employees and expanding its delivery footprint to six strategic locations. Vayavya Labs, incorporated in 2006, specializes in embedded software & systems, virtualization, and verification & validation technologies, serving global customers in Semiconductors, Automotive, and Consumer Electronics. The deal is expected to create cross-sell and up-sell opportunities, enhancing revenue growth and strengthening Moschip's end-to-end engineering offerings.

  • Moschip acquires 73% of Vayavya Labs for ₹245.49 Cr.
  • Consideration split: 60.50% cash, 39.50% through share-swap.
  • Acquisition strengthens software-led engineering solutions and expands global footprint.
  • Vayavya Labs brings expertise in embedded software, virtualization, and 9 patents.
  • Deal creates cross-sell opportunities and enhances revenue growth for Moschip.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Moschip Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus gets USFDA EIR for Ahmedabad oncology injectable facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zydus Lifesciences has announced that it has received the Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) and an approval letter from the USFDA. This clearance follows a Pre-Approval Inspection (PAI) conducted at the company's SEZ oncology injectable manufacturing facility located in SEZ1, Ahmedabad. The approval specifically pertains to a new isolator injectable line at the site. The USFDA inspection was carried out between November 4 and November 13, 2025. This regulatory approval is crucial for the company, as it signifies that the facility meets the necessary standards for manufacturing oncology injectable products, potentially paving the way for future product approvals and commercialization from this specialized line.

  • Zydus received USFDA EIR for its Ahmedabad oncology injectable facility.
  • Approval covers a new isolator injectable line at the SEZ site.
  • USFDA inspection occurred from November 4 to 13, 2025.
  • This regulatory clearance is vital for future product launches.
  • Enhances manufacturing capabilities for oncology injectables.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: USFDA

item.title: [SGFIN] SG Finserve: FY26 Audited Results Approved, New Director Appointed
item.description:
SG Finserve Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 16, 2026, approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the appointment of Mr. Deepak Kumar as an Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive - Non-Independent Director-Chairperson, effective April 16, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Kumar, a Chartered Accountant with over two decades of experience, currently serves as Whole Time Director and Group CFO at APL Apollo Tubes Limited. The financial results include the Statement of Assets and Liability and Cash Flow statements, accompanied by an unmodified audit report from M/s. S.P. Chopra & Co. Additionally, disclosures regarding the utilization of issue proceeds and security cover for listed Non-Convertible Securities were provided.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Mr. Deepak Kumar appointed as Additional Director (Non-Executive).
  • Audit report for financial results received an unmodified opinion.
  • Disclosures on issue proceeds utilization and security cover provided.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SG Finserve Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WPIL] WPIL to publish Audited Financial Results for Q4/FY26
item.description:
WPIL Ltd has informed the stock exchange that it will publish its Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, within the stipulated regulatory timeframe. Consequently, the company will not be preparing or publishing Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This communication serves as an advance intimation to the regulatory bodies regarding their financial reporting approach for the period.

  • WPIL will release Audited Financial Results for Q4/FY26.
  • The results cover the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Unaudited results for Q4 FY26 will not be published.
  • This ensures timely compliance with reporting regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WPIL LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SGFIN] SG Finserve Board Approves Q4 & FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
SG Finserve Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 16, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company also announced the appointment of Mr. Deepak Kumar (DIN: 03056481) as an Additional Director in the Non-Executive - Non-Independent Director-Chairperson category, effective April 16, 2026, subject to member approval. The financial results, including the Statement of Assets and Liability and Cash Flow statements, along with the Audit Report by M/s. S.P. Chopra & Co., Statutory Auditors, were enclosed. The audit reports carry an unmodified opinion. Additionally, disclosures regarding the utilization of issue proceeds and security cover for listed Non-Convertible Securities were provided.

  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Mr. Deepak Kumar appointed as Additional Non-Executive Director.
  • Audit Report by S.P. Chopra & Co. issued with unmodified opinion.
  • Disclosures made on issue proceeds utilization and security cover.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SG Finserve Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MOSCHIP] Moschip to acquire 73% of Vayavya Labs for ₹245.49 Cr, partly via shares
item.description:
Moschip Technologies Ltd. announced the acquisition of 73% of Vayavya Labs Private Limited (VLPL) for a total consideration of ₹245.49 crores. The payment structure includes ₹148.52 crores in cash and ₹96.97 crores through the issuance of 50,50,686 equity shares to VLPL's selling shareholders on a preferential basis at ₹192 per share. This strategic move aims to bolster Moschip's software-led engineering capabilities, drive top-line growth and EBITDA, and expand its presence in Product Engineering Solutions. VLPL, with a provisional turnover of ₹83 crores for FY26, operates in Semiconductors, Consumer Electronics, and Automotive Communication. Moschip plans to acquire the remaining 27% of VLPL after March 31, 2028, with valuation linked to VLPL's business performance. The transaction is subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, with an EGM scheduled for May 12, 2026.

  • Moschip acquires 73% stake in Vayavya Labs for ₹245.49 Cr.
  • Consideration includes ₹148.52 Cr cash and ₹96.97 Cr via swap shares.
  • 50,50,686 equity shares issued at ₹192 each to selling shareholders.
  • Acquisition strengthens software engineering, boosts growth and EBITDA.
  • Remaining 27% stake to be acquired post-March 2028 based on performance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Moschip Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DAAWAT] LT Foods appoints Ritesh Sud as CMO for India & Far East
item.description:
LT Foods Ltd, a global FMCG company, announced the appointment of Mr. Ritesh Sud as Chief Marketing Officer – India & Far East. This strategic move aims to reinforce brand-led growth, enhance consumer relevance, and transform the company into a future-ready, consumer-centric organization. Mr. Sud will provide strategic leadership to strengthen market leadership, expand into high-growth categories, build differentiated brands, drive premiumisation, and unlock new growth opportunities across India and the Far East. He will report to Mr. Ritesh Arora, CEO – India & Far East. Mr. Sud brings over 20 years of diverse FMCG experience, having previously served as Vice President (Marketing) at Tata Consumer Products Limited and Associate Director – Marketing at Perfetti Van Melle, where he managed iconic brands like Tata Tea, Himalayan, Happydent, and Alpenliebe Juzt Jelly. His expertise in building purpose-led and digital-first brands is expected to accelerate LT Foods' next phase of growth.

  • LT Foods appointed Ritesh Sud as Chief Marketing Officer for India & Far East.
  • Sud will lead brand-led growth, market expansion, and premiumisation strategies.
  • He brings over 20 years of FMCG marketing experience from Tata Consumer and Perfetti Van Melle.
  • The appointment aims to strengthen marketing capabilities and accelerate company growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LT FOODS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MOSCHIP] Moschip to acquire 73% of Vayavya Labs for ₹245.49 Cr
item.description:
Moschip Technologies Ltd. announced the acquisition of 73% of Vayavya Labs Private Limited (VLPL) for a total consideration of ₹245.49 crores. The payment structure includes ₹148.52 crores in cash and ₹96.97 crores through the issuance of 50,50,686 swap equity shares at ₹192 each. The Board also approved a Shareholders' Agreement to acquire the remaining 27% of VLPL after March 31, 2028, with valuation linked to VLPL's business performance. This acquisition aims to significantly strengthen MosChip’s software-led engineering capabilities, boost top-line growth and EBITDA, move the company up the value chain in Product Engineering Solutions, and achieve geographical expansion and business diversification. VLPL, with a provisional turnover of ₹83 crores for the year ended March 31, 2026, operates in Semiconductors, Consumer Electronics, Mobility/Automotive Communication & Connectivity. The transaction is subject to shareholder and requisite regulatory approvals, with an EGM scheduled for May 12, 2026.

  • Moschip acquires 73% stake in Vayavya Labs for ₹245.49 crores.
  • Consideration includes ₹148.52 crores cash and ₹96.97 crores via swap shares.
  • Remaining 27% stake to be acquired post-March 2028, linked to performance.
  • Acquisition strengthens software engineering, boosts growth, and diversifies business.
  • Vayavya Labs reported provisional turnover of ₹83 crores for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Moschip Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RAMAVISION] Rama Vision clarifies share price movement is market driven
item.description:
Rama Vision Ltd received a letter from the stock exchange seeking clarification on significant share price movement. The company affirmed its compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, stating it has promptly disclosed all material and price-sensitive information. Rama Vision confirmed there is no undisclosed information or impending announcement that could explain the recent price behavior. The company attributes the share price fluctuations to purely market-driven factors and prevailing market conditions, over which it has no control or knowledge of specific reasons. It further assured continued prompt disclosure of all material events.

  • Rama Vision received a query from BSE on significant share price movement.
  • Company states it complies with SEBI disclosure regulations.
  • No undisclosed price-sensitive information or announcements exist.
  • Share price movement is purely market driven, company has no control.
  • Assures continued prompt disclosure of material events.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMA VISION LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [KRYPTONQ] Krypton Industries: Escrow Payment Mechanism Not Applicable
item.description:
Krypton Industries Ltd. has clarified that the Escrow Payment Mechanism, as per SEBI Regulations, is not applicable to the company. This response was in reference to a mail dated April 15, 2026, requesting details on the mechanism. The company stated it has not issued and does not possess any instruments or arrangements that would necessitate the application of this mechanism. Consequently, Krypton Industries is not required to make any disclosures or submissions in this regard.

  • Krypton Industries clarified non-applicability of Escrow Payment Mechanism.
  • Company has no instruments or arrangements requiring the mechanism.
  • SEBI Regulations for escrow payments do not apply to Krypton.
  • No disclosure or submission is required from the company.
  • This confirms compliance with regulatory requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KRYPTON INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Clarification
